chain.thought: Explanation: Giza has an area of 85,153 km² (which is at least 20,000 km²) and a population of 6,272,571 (which is over 5,000,000), meeting both criteria.

judge_thought: Explanation: The criteria are area at least 20,000 km² and population over 5,000,000. From the table, Giza has an area of 85,153 km² and a population of 6,272,571, satisfying both conditions. Other entries either have area below 20,000 km² (e.g., Cairo, Alexandria) or population below 5,000,000 (e.g., Asyut, Gharbia), so Giza is valid.
